title: onochilis lutea
intro: Onochilis lutea, also known as Yellow St. Paul's Wort, is a flowering plant species in the genus Ononis. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onochilis lutea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Onochilis lutea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
